description:
Legal record (#29) in a court register/pinqas from a beit din in Cairo (on f. 4r of T-S K22.27). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated in the final third of Tammuz 5458 CE, which is 1698 CE. 

(Document #29) Investment partnership between Yehuda Roditi and Levi [Roditi] with Avraham Roditi, who is listed as the brother of Yehuda. Avraham Roditi may also have been Levi's father based on document entry #17 (PGPID 40956) under the same shelfmark. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
